content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://itif.org/publications/2025/10/20/eu-should-improve-transparency-in-the-digital-services-act/", "source_title": "EU Should Improve Transparency in the Digital Services Act", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "This contribution examines the why and the how of social media regulation under the DSA, drawing insights from the first steps of its implem...", "direct_quote": "This contribution examines the why and the how of social media regulation under the DSA, drawing insights from the first steps of its implementation.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "It argues that, contrary to the portrayal of the DSA as a tool for censorship by high-ranking US officials, the Regulation actually protects...", "direct_quote": "It argues that, contrary to the portrayal of the DSA as a tool for censorship by high-ranking US officials, the Regulation actually protects freedom of expression online by establishing a new model of governance for social media platforms.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
